testcase.name: CLI_1: promote.py fails on non-existent ID
CLI_2: promote.py successfully scaffolds valid ID
CLI_3: promote.py exits 0 on already promoted ID
CLI_4: prompt-gen.py fails when no args provided
CLI_5: prompt-gen.py fails on invalid ID
CLI_6: prompt-gen.py performs variable substitution
F10_1: verify with an exit-0 acceptance test reports passed:true
F10_2: verify with a non-zero acceptance test reports passed:false
F10_3: verify records the result onto a given attempt
F10_4: verify when acceptance mode is 'human' returns 400
F10_5: verify with no verify script returns 400
F10_6: verify protects against path traversal / injection in id
F10_7: verify terminates an infinite-loop acceptance test via timeout

testsuite.name: f11_lifecycle.test.js > F11: Full one-shot lifecycle (vision -> attempt -> verify -> summary)

testcase.name: F11_1: a one-shot can be created, specced, attempted, verified, and reflected in the scan
testcase.classname: f11_lifecycle.test.js > F11: Full one-shot lifecycle (vision -> attempt -> verify -> summary)

testcase.name: F12_1: GET /api/ideas returns 200 OK status
F12_2: GET /api/ideas returns application/json content-type
F12_3: GET /api/ideas returns a JSON array
F12_4: GET /api/ideas returns at least 51 items
F12_5: GET /api/ideas items contain all required registry fields
F12_6: POST /api/ideas creating a valid idea returns 200 and updates files on disk
F12_7: POST /api/ideas returns 400 Bad Request if fields are missing or empty
F12_8: POST /api/ideas returns 400 Bad Request if category is not in allowed list
F12_9: POST /api/ideas returns 400 Bad Request if inputs contain traversal or prototype pollution keywords
F12_10: POST /api/ideas duplicates resolution automatically appends numeric suffix
F1_1: Root contains one-shots directory
F1_2: Root contains dashboard directory
F1_3: Root contains tests/e2e directory
F1_4: Root contains README.md
F1_5: Root contains AGENTS.md
F1_6: All items under one-shots are directories or gitkeep
F1_7: All one-shot subdirectories match kebab-case naming format
F1_8: Each one-shot directory contains a valid package.json file if it is not empty
F1_9: Each one-shot package.json name matches its directory name
F1_10: No files under one-shots cross-import sibling one-shots
F2_1: notion-scraper directory exists under one-shots
F2_2: notion-scraper contains package.json
F2_3: notion-scraper package.json contains correct name
F2_4: notion-scraper contains README.md
F2_5: notion-scraper README.md contains Notion configuration instructions
F2_6: notion-scraper has index.js or main entry point
F2_7: notion-scraper package.json contains client dependency
F2_8: notion-scraper package.json declares test script
F2_9: notion-scraper package.json declares start script
F2_10: notion-scraper runs mock tests or dry run successfully
F3_1: GET /api/scan returns status 200
F3_2: GET /api/scan response has application/json content type
F3_3: GET /api/scan returns a JSON array
F3_4: GET /api/scan elements have required fields
F3_5: GET /api/scan returns notion-scraper if implemented
F3_6: GET /api/scan dynamically scans new one-shots added to disk
F3_7: GET /api/scan dynamically removes deleted one-shots
F3_8: GET /api/scan handles corrupt package.json gracefully
F3_9: GET /api/scan ignores non-directory files in one-shots folder
F3_10: GET /api/scan ignores directories without package.json
F4_1: POST /api/run requires POST method
F4_2: POST /api/run with missing payload returns 400 Bad Request
F4_3: POST /api/run with non-existent script ID returns 404 Not Found
F4_4: POST /api/run with invalid action returns 400 Bad Request
F4_5: POST /api/run runs simple command and returns success
F4_6: POST /api/run execution returns output, success, and exit code details
F4_7: POST /api/run handles execution failure (exits non-zero)
F4_8: POST /api/run terminates infinite loop scripts via timeout
F4_9: POST /api/run protects against shell injection in script ID
F4_10: POST /api/run protects against path traversal in script ID
F5_1: GET / page loads successfully with 200 status
F5_2: GET / response has text/html content-type
F5_3: GET / HTML contains Next.js markers
F5_4: GET / HTML contains brand name OneShotForge
F5_5: GET / HTML lists notion-scraper if it exists
F5_6: GET / HTML contains stats layout components
F5_7: GET / HTML contains sidebar element container
F5_8: GET / HTML contains refresh/rescan button
F5_9: GET / HTML displays error banner state if scan fails
F5_10: GET / HTML uses responsive tailwind grid layout classes
F6_1: GET /api/scan?search=notion returns matching item
F6_2: GET /api/scan?search=NOTION is case-insensitive
F6_3: GET /api/scan?search= notion trims whitespace
F6_4: GET /api/scan?search=nonexistent returns empty/filtered array
F6_5: GET /api/scan?tag=scraper returns scraper-tagged items
F6_6: GET /api/scan?tag=test-tag returns both items
F6_7: GET /api/scan?tag=nonexistent returns no matching items
F6_8: GET /api/scan with search and tag combined (intersection)
F6_9: GET /api/scan search handles regex special characters safely
F6_10: GET /api/scan returns sorted results by name alphabetically
F7_1: GET /api/scan/temp-preview-standard returns metadata successfully
F7_2: GET /api/scan/temp-preview-standard/readme returns README content
F7_3: GET /api/scan/nonexistent-id returns 404
F7_4: GET /api/scan/nonexistent-id/readme returns 404
F7_5: GET /api/scan/temp-preview-missing-readme/readme handles missing README file gracefully
F7_6: GET /api/scan/temp-preview-xss/readme sanitizes XSS in markdown rendering
F7_7: GET /api/scan/../dashboard prevents path traversal for metadata
F7_8: GET /api/scan/../dashboard/readme prevents path traversal for readme
F7_9: GET /api/scan/temp-preview-standard metadata includes tags and path details
F7_10: GET /api/scan/temp-preview-standard/readme parses Markdown into HTML
F8_1: POST /api/export requires POST method
F8_2: POST /api/export with invalid ID returns 404
F8_3: POST /api/export with valid ID returns zip archive
F8_4: POST /api/export returns valid ZIP header bytes
F8_5: POST /api/polish requires POST method
F8_6: POST /api/polish with invalid ID returns 404
F8_7: POST /api/polish with valid payload updates metadata/code
F8_8: POST /api/polish payload validation checks
F8_9: POST /api/suggest with invalid ID returns 404
F8_10: POST /api/suggest returns suggestions structure successfully
F9_1: GET manifest for a one-shot with no manifest returns hasManifest:false
F9_2: POST /api/manifest/spec creates a vision (write-once 200 then 409)
F9_3: POST /api/manifest/attempt appends to append-only history
F9_4: POST /api/manifest/evaluation records fidelity on an existing attempt
F9_5: evaluation for a missing attempt returns 404
F9_6: spec rejects prototype-pollution keys with 400
F9_7: invalid id (path traversal) returns 404
F9_8: spec for a non-existent one-shot returns 404
F9_9: corrupt oneshot.json is surfaced as 'corrupt' (not a 500, not silent)
F9_11: writes to a corrupt manifest are refused (no silent data loss)
F9_10: GET /api/scan attaches a manifest summary to items
T3_1: New One-Shot Creation to API Scan Reflection (F1 <-> F3)
T3_2: Deleted One-Shot Clean Up (F1 <-> F3 <-> F6)
T3_3: Run/Test Failure Updates Sidebar Success Stats (F8 <-> F4 <-> F5)
T3_4: Search/Filter Persistence During Preview Toggle (F6 <-> F7)
T3_5: Polishing a One-Shot Updates Monorepo and Scan (F8 <-> F1 <-> F3)
T3_6: Export Action Generates Independent Directory (F8 <-> F1)
T3_7: Invalid Monorepo Structure Causes Scan Warning (F1 <-> F3 <-> F5)
T3_8: Run Action Terminal Stream with Preview Toggle (F8 <-> F7)
T3_9: Add New One-Shot, Search for it, and Run its Test (F1 <-> F6 <-> F4)
T3_10: Create, Polish, Scan, Run, and Export Lifecycle (F1 <-> F8 <-> F3 <-> F4)
T4_1: Full User Journey - Onboarding and Running Scraper
T4_2: Multi-step Monorepo Growth Scenario
T4_3: Error Resilience and Recovery Workflow
T4_4: AI-driven Improvement and Polish Loop
T4_5: Concurrent Executions and System Load Management
T4_6: Clean Monorepo Migration and Export Lifecycle
T4_7: Security Isolation - check one-shot execution cannot write outside one-shots
T4_8: Scale Scanning - check scanner handles 50 temporary folders efficiently
T4_9: Standalone Export Validation - verify exported package package.json exists
T4_10: Buggy script recovery cycle - run, fail, edit, run, pass
T5_1: /api/scan/[id] crash resilience with null package.json
T5_2: /api/polish value type validation to prevent package.json corruption
T5_3: /api/run command injection bypass with absolute path arguments
T5_4: /api/run command injection bypass with absolute root prefix
T5_5: /api/export symlink traversal prevention
